LanguageData.ARA_Myrmecocystus_Production_InsectJelly: This Arachne honeypot species is producing insect honey to nourish the insect colony.
LanguageData.ARA_Myrmecocystus_Production_Medicine.de: Causes the honeypot species to undergo endogenous evolution at the expense of producing Arachne honey, allowing it to hatch medical cocoons and allow the use of medical abilities and manipulation of the phylogenetic species. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide auxiliary insects.
This Arachne honeypot species has been exalted and no longer produces insect honey. Instead, it regularly produces medicines that are scarce in the nest, and can control parasitic parasites.
LanguageData.ARA_Myrmecocystus_Production_Fuel.label: Honeypot species conversion - flammable chamber
LanguageData.ARA_Myrmecocystus_Production_Fuel.descri: Causes the honeypot species to undergo endogenous evolution, at the expense of producing Arachne honey, so that it can produce chemical fuel, enhance its armor, and give it the additional ability to shoot fire. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide auxiliary insects.
LanguageData.ARA_Myrmecocystus_Production_Fuel.label: Subspecies - deflagration species
LanguageData.ARA_Myrmecocystus_Production_Fuel.descri: This Arachne honeypot species has been enchanted and no longer produces insect honey, but produces the scarce chemical fuel for the nest, and can fight enemies by spraying fire.
LanguageData.ARA_Myrmecocystus_Production_Dissolver.l: Honeypot species conversion - strong acid decomposition
LanguageData.ARA_Myrmecocystus_Production_Dissolver.d: Causes honeypot species to undergo endogenous evolution, giving them additional dissolving abilities and releasing lipolytic acid to non-Insect prisoners and slaves, which will continue to cause them to lose body parts to produce insect honey. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide auxiliary insects.
This Arachne honeypot species has gained the ability to transform hateful enemies into delicious meals by spraying fat-dissolving acid at extremely close range.
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Base.label: Hive Marine
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Base.description: Arachne's warrior bugs can turn their bodies into their most powerful weapons. As technology is unlocked, they will gain access to a variety of skills for use.
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Invisibility.label: Warrior Type Conversion - Invisible Killer
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Invisibility.description: Causes the warrior species to evolve internally, greatly impairing its ability to use long-range weapons and special skills in exchange for near-permanent invisibility and powerful melee capabilities. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide auxiliary insects.
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Invisibility.label: Subspecies - hunter species
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Invisibility.description: The evolved warrior species has acquired special iris cells covering the whole body. These cells containing nanocrystals can refract light everywhere to achieve a permanent invisible state until they launch an attack. In addition, they have also gained more powerful close-range combat capabilities. The disadvantage is that the degradation of the compound eyes makes it difficult to shoot.
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Genestealer.label: Warrior species conversion - gene thief
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Genestealer.description: The warrior species undergoes endogenous evolution, compromising its combat capabilities and ability to use skills, in exchange for the ability to steal genes from the enemy and inject genes into its own colonists. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide auxiliary insects.
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Genestealer.label: Subspecies-Aberration
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Genestealer.description: The mutants are a mobile gene pool. They no longer have the job of licking blood among the swarms, but focus on purifying the high-quality genes of prisoners and slaves and giving them to high-quality individuals in the zerg.
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Base.label: Living cigarette can
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Base.description: The Mist Seeds are the big guys among the Arachne Zerg. They not only have thick shells, but their abdomens filled with pheromone smoke can emit gas that covers the battlefield, attracting smaller auxiliary insects to break out of the ground and launch crazy attacks on the enemy.
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Production_Bacterium.label: Mist species conversion——Jiu Bacteria Specialization
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Production_Bacterium.descri: Make the mist species undergo endogenous evolution, at the expense of spraying pheromones and reducing armor, so that it can regularly produce the advanced material of the Arachne Zerg - Activated Giant Bacteria. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide auxiliary insects.
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Production_Bacterium.label: Subspecies - Breeding strain
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Production_Bacterium.descri: This Arachne Mist Species has obtained its glory, the front carapace has fallen off and it can no longer emit pheromones, in exchange for the ability to produce activated bacteria. One breeding strain produces 5 servings of activated bacteria every day.
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Creeper.label: Mist seed conversion - Creep support
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Creeper.description: Make the mist species undergo endogenous evolution, at the expense of ejecting pheromones, so that they can gain additional defense, movement speed, and the ability to lay mushroom carpets in a large area and at high speeds. \n\nThis evolution direction provides 6 Arachne Explosive Auxiliary Insects.
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Creeper.label: Subspecies-king species
LanguageData.ARA_Smokepop_Creeper.description: This Arachne Mist Seed has been granted Bazhao and can move around while laying down creep to transform the terrain around its lair or establish a path to invade other settlements. In addition, it also gained the ability to project fungi at enemies.
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_Base.label: hard carapace
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_Base.description: Although the shield-headed species is smaller and does not feel as oppressive as the large Arachne Zerg, its defense is no weaker than those of the large Zerg due to the carapace covering its body.
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_Protector.label: Shieldhead Conversion—Hive Guard
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_Protector.description: The shield-headed species undergo endogenous evolution, at the expense of its ability to produce chitin and build buildings, so that it can acquire more powerful combat capabilities, movement capabilities, and collision attack skills. \n\nThis evolution direction provides 4 Arachne acid seed-eating auxiliary insects.
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_Protector.label: Subspecies-nest guard species
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_Protector.description: This Arachne shield-headed creature has gained brilliance, making its combat abilities even more powerful and allowing it to attack opponents with powerful rams.
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_HiveBuilder.label: Shieldhead Conversion - Master Builder
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_HiveBuilder.description: This causes the shield-headed species to undergo endogenous evolution, allowing it to acquire more powerful chitin production capabilities and construction skills at the expense of its defense capabilities. \n\nThis evolution direction provides 4 Arachne auxiliary insects.
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_HiveBuilder.label: Subspecies-constructed species
LanguageData.ARA_ShieldHead_HiveBuilder.description: This Arachne shield-headed species has been granted glory and has strong output and construction capabilities. A shieldhead species produces an additional 15 copies of chitin per day.
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Base.label: Flying behemoth
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Base.description: Rulers of the sky, the Arachne Skyborn are large but agile and deadly creatures, capable of carrying large weapons while possessing maneuverability that few others can match. They can forcefully carry their own Zerg that has not yet fallen to the ground to enhance the mobility of the slow Zerg on the battlefield.
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Ferry.label: Conversion of Sky to Sky Species—Porter Bee
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Ferry.description: It causes the aerial species to evolve internally, allowing it to gain a higher movement speed at the expense of losing its high-altitude maneuverability, and greatly increases the movement speed of the expedition team during the expedition. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide Arachne auxiliaries.
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Ferry.label: subspecies-shuttle species
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Ferry.description: This Arachne aerial species has been granted glory. Although it can no longer hatch auxiliary insects, it is extremely fast and can fly normally to increase the speed of the expedition.
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Empthrower.label: Space-to-sky transformation—electromagnetic storm
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Empthrower.description: The aerial species undergo endogenous evolution, at the expense of reduced mobility and loss of high-altitude maneuverability, allowing them to gain the ability to throw magnetic storm species auxiliary insects - these auxiliary insects will release EMP in a suicide attack to fight against the mechanical race. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide Arachne auxiliaries.
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Empthrower.label: Subspecies-Hurricane species
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Empthrower.description: This Arachne Sky Seed has obtained the Bazhao and will throw Magnetic Storm Seed auxiliary insects. These auxiliary insects release EMP in a suicide attack to fight against the enemy mechanical race.
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Hivelord.label: Transformation of Sky and Sky Species—Lord of Brood Insects
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Hivelord.description: The aerial species undergo endogenous evolution, at the expense of reduced mobility and loss of high-altitude maneuverability, allowing them to gain the ability to hatch a large number of auxiliary insects of the sky nest species - these auxiliary insects are small in size and will cling to the enemy with annoying melee combat. \n\nThis evolution direction provides 8 Arachne Skynest auxiliary insects.
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Hivelord.label: Subspecies-Lord Species
LanguageData.ARA_Skyraider_Hivelord.description: This Arachne Sky Seed has obtained Bazhao and can throw Skynest Seed Auxiliary Insects. These sensitive Aerial Insects will then spread out to hunt targets.
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Base.label: Queen's Throat
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Base.description: The Arachne Guards are agents of will personally cultivated by the Queen. Not only do they have superb shooting skills, but they can also command friendly troops on the battlefield to make them stronger.
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Navigator.label: 禁卫种转换——引航灯塔
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Navigator.description: The guard species undergo endogenous evolution, sacrificing their shooting ability, jumping ability, and commanding ability in exchange for the ability to command aerial beasts and insects. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide Arachne auxiliaries. Additionally, the Aerial Beast must be successfully airborne in order to be commanded - by the time you unlock this evolution path, the Aerial Beast should not be buildable yet.
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Navigator.label: Subspecies - pilot species
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Navigator.description: This Arachne Guard species has obtained the Bahyao. Although it has lost its direct combat ability, it can command the aerial beasts and insects and crush the enemy with the absolute air superiority of the insect swarms.
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Legion.label: Guard species conversion - Might of the Legion
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Legion.description: It causes the guard species to evolve internally, sacrificing command ability in exchange for more powerful melee, long-range, defense, and the ability to fight against enemies through tail flicking, collision, jumping and other physical skills. \n\nThis evolutionary direction does not provide Arachne auxiliaries.
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Legion.label: Subspecies-Legion Species
LanguageData.ARA_Praetorian_Legion.description: This Arachne guard species has achieved great glory, and its combat ability has reached its peak among insect swarm node individuals.
LanguageData.ARA_Slayer_Base.label: The violent beast
LanguageData.ARA_Slayer_Base.description: Arachne is a special kind of beast insect. Compared with its brothers and sisters, its intelligence level is much lower, but it has also gained advantages that other insect races cannot match - its huge size and thick carapace, which allows it to withstand all attacks and serve as a heavy hammer to smash the enemy's defensive positions.
LanguageData.ARA_WeaponSmith_Base.label: Hive Maintainer
LanguageData.ARA_WeaponSmith_Base.description: Arachne's Craftsmen are industrious worker bees who are responsible for maintaining the entire structure of the hive and keeping it functioning at its best.
LanguageData.ArachnaeQueen_Neurotyrant_1Stage.label: spell strength
